ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Matt Goettsch appearing for Trevor Roberts for the administrator. Bruce Feder appearing as Court appointed guardian ad litem for two minors. Issues addressed. Mr. Feder recommeded to have the SNT here. The examiner has modified the order for final distribution. Mr. Goettsch will submit a revise the order. Status for filing of petition to establish the SNT is set on 7/2. If the petition is on file, no appearance is required. Court will let counsel work out who is going to file the petition.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Helen Soret-Matley CSR# 9225. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.
